ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Order ID associated with the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the transaction */,
  "installments" INTEGER /* Number of installments for the transaction */,
  "sequential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is part of a sequential payment plan */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method used (e.g., credit_card, bank_transfer) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Total value of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "gateway_used" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the transaction */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address used for the transaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the transaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "fraud_score" TEXT /* Score indicating the likelihood of fraud */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., processed, pending, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES transaction_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_type FOREIGN KEY ("payment_type") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipped order */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_amount" TEXT /* Shipping amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address for the order */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer registered */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the customer's last login */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's primary address */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the customer */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit_card, bank_transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is active */,
  "min_amount" TEXT /* Minimum amount for the payment method */,
  "max_amount" TEXT /* Maximum amount for the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction status (e.g., processed, pending, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction status */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is a final status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is a final status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_detection" (
  "fraud_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraud detection event */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction being monitored */,
  "detection_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the fraud was detected */,
  "detection_method" TEXT /* Method used to detect the fraud (e.g., machine_learning, manual_review) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the detected fraud (e.g., flagged, blocked) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes related to the fraud detection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who detected the fraud */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the detected fraud */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address where the fraud was detected */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the fraud */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fraud_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_detection_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_detection_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction history entry */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change occurred */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the transaction */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer_service, fraud_analyst) */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "last_password_change_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installment plan */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction associated with the installment plan */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the installment plan */,
  "installment_number" INTEGER /* Number of the installment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the installment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the installment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the installment (e.g., due, paid, overdue) */,
  "paid_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the installment was paid */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Late fee applied to the installment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installment_plans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installment_plans_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
